scripts.lint: pnpm lint:root && pnpm lint:non-workspace && pnpm --recursive --parallel --workspace-concurrency=6 run lint
scripts.lint:check: pnpm lint:root:check && pnpm lint:non-workspace:check && pnpm --recursive --parallel --workspace-concurrency=6 run lint:check
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter quasar test:specs:ci && pnpm --filter quasar test && pnpm --filter @quasar/vite-plugin test
